procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1120
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1120 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

key_events.description: Technique executed on a GitHub Actions ephemeral Windows VM. Ephemeral runners are isolated per-job; no persistent outbound C2 or lateral movement observed across execution window.

osquery.name: t1120_sys_info
osquery.query_text: SELECT hostname, cpu_type, physical_memory, hardware_vendor, hardware_model FROM system_info;

osquery.name: t1120_net_enum
osquery.query_text: SELECT interface, address, mask, type FROM interface_addresses WHERE interface != 'lo';
